items.title: CEOs feel AI FOMO, but many of them and their lieutenants have gotten used to arms-length…
items.title_zh: 首席执行官们对 AI FOMO 感到恐惧，但他们中的许多人和他们的副手已经习惯了保持一定的距离……
items.description: CEOs feel AI FOMO, but many of them and their lieutenants have gotten used to arms-length leadership and lack the muscle to get hands-on with AI. So they set sweeping, imprecise AI mandates for their company. This leads to performative, lo…
items.description_zh: 首席执行官们对人工智能感到害怕，但他们中的许多人和他们的副手已经习惯了保持距离的领导方式，并且缺乏动手实践人工智能的能力。因此，他们为公司制定了全面、不精确的人工智能指令。这导致了表演性的、低...

meta.bio: Product Leader at Google - Gemini, Veo, Nano Banana. All opinions mine.

items.title: to be clear I don't think the models are quite there yet, Bun is extremely verifiable and…
items.title_zh: 需要明确的是，我认为模型还没有完全成熟，Bun 是非常可验证的，而且……
items.description: to be clear I don't think the models are quite there yet, Bun is extremely verifiable and has incredible test coverage but I think they will get there
items.description_zh: 需要明确的是，我认为模型还没有完全实现，Bun 非常可验证，并且具有令人难以置信的测试覆盖率，但我认为他们会实现这一目标

items.title: my main takeaway from the Bun rewrite is that legacy codebases will be incredibly valuabl…
items.title_zh: 我从 Bun 重写中得到的主要收获是遗留代码库将非常有价值......
items.description: my main takeaway from the Bun rewrite is that legacy codebases will be incredibly valuable as a source for "distilling" code into new forms every game should be crossplatform, all legacy software should work on the web, we don't need COBOL…
items.description_zh: 我从 Bun 重写中得到的主要收获是，遗留代码库将非常有价值，作为将代码“提炼”成新形式的来源，每个游戏都应该是跨平台的，所有遗留软件都应该在网络上运行，我们不需要 COBOL……

items.title: CEOs are uniquely prone to AI psychosis because they’re sufficiently distant from the las…
items.title_zh: 首席执行官特别容易患人工智能精神病，因为他们距离激光足够远……
items.description: CEOs are uniquely prone to AI psychosis because they’re sufficiently distant from the last mile of work that still has to happen to generate most value with AI. So when they play with AI, they see the happy path results, often not consider…
items.description_zh: 首席执行官特别容易患上人工智能精神病，因为他们距离最后一英里的工作还很远，而最后一英里的工作仍然需要通过人工智能产生最大的价值。因此，当他们玩人工智能时，他们看到的是快乐路径的结果，通常不会考虑……

items.title: Is AGI already here?
items.description: Is AGI already here? "I think if we froze the models that we have right now and you really worked on the harness and maybe we also spent more time training with a great harness, I think people would really feel the AGI in every single doma…
items.description_zh: AGI已经来了吗？ “我认为，如果我们冻结我们现在拥有的模型，并且你真的在安全带上做了很多工作，也许我们还花了更多时间使用出色的安全带进行训练，我认为人们会真正感受到每一个领域的 AGI ......

items.title: I recently discovered a life-changing Mac app “Amphetamine” which keeps your Mac awake ev…
items.title_zh: 我最近发现了一款​​改变生活的 Mac 应用程序“Amphetamine”，它可以让您的 Mac 时刻保持清醒……
items.description: I recently discovered a life-changing Mac app “Amphetamine” which keeps your Mac awake even when lid is closed Much more reliable & easier to use than the caffeinate command in the terminal Now I can finally close my laptop with peace…
items.description_zh: 我最近发现了一款​​改变生活的 Mac 应用程序“Amphetamine”，即使在盖子合上的情况下，它也能让您的 Mac 保持清醒状态，比终端中的咖啡因命令更可靠、更易于使用。现在我终于可以安心地合上笔记本电脑了……
